name: Lorenz Chaotic Swarm
description: A swarm of spheres follows the Lorenz attractor: dx/dt = σ(y - x), dy/dt = x(ρ - z) - y, dz/dt = xy - βz. Chaos in motion.

jsLoop.code: function jsLoop(ctx, state) { state = state || { initialized: false, count: 20, bodies: [] }; var sigma = 10; var rho = 28; var beta = 8/3; var dt = 0.01; var patches = []; if (!state.initialized) { var objects = []; for (var i = 0; i < state.count; i++) { var pos = [Math.random()*10, Math.random()*10, Math.random()*10]; objects.push({ id: 'lzn_' + i, type: 'Sphere', radius: 0.5, position: pos, mass: 1, isStatic: true, color: 'hsl(' + (i * 18) + ', 80%, 50%)' }); state.bodies.push({ id: 'lzn_' + i, x: pos[0], y: pos[1], z: pos[2] }); } state.initialized = true; return { state: state, addObjects: objects }; } for (var i = 0; i < state.bodies.length; i++) { var b = state.bodies[i]; var dx = sigma * (b.y - b.x); var dy = b.x * (rho - b.z) - b.y; var dz = b.x * b.y - beta * b.z; b.x += dx * dt; b.y += dy * dt; b.z += dz * dt; patches.push({ op: 'replace', path: '/objects/' + i + '/position', value: [b.x, b.z, b.y] }); } return { state: state, patches: patches }; }
